Piero di Cosimo

Virgin and Child with the Young Saint John the Baptist, Saint Cecilia, and Angels
by Piero di Cosimo
Italy · sixteenth century · 1500–1510 · Oil on panel
Standing Figure Leaning on a Staff
by Piero di Cosimo
Italy · 1508–1512 · Pen and brown ink on tan laid paper
